memoryArtifacts.headline: Tartan Clan Gordon (Vestiarium_Scoticum) or Gordon of Esslemont
memoryArtifacts.description:
Tartan date: 01/01/1842

from Wiki

Gordon tartan, as published in the Vestiarium Scoticum of 1842. The tartan is based upon the Black Watch tartan..................................... This sett with three lines is said to have come about when the 4th Duke of Gordon applied to Forsyth of Huntly to provide kilts for his troops. Forsyth is said to have produced three designs with one, two and three yellow stripes respectively. The Duke chose the single stripe and called in the heads of some Gordon branches to choose from the others. Esslemont is said to have taken the three stripe version. This sett appears in Vestiarium Scoticum but is simply called Gordon with no mention of Esselmont anywhere and is listed under 'Border Clans'. Where the suffix of Esselmont has come from has yet to be discovered - Esselmont is near Ellon in Aberdeenshire. Also D.C. Stewart "The Setts of the Scottish Tartans" 1950 No: 65. W & A K Johnston. Sample in Paton's collection. According to the story, The Duke of Gordon passed on the unwanted samples of the selection from Wilson's, to members of the family. The three stripe version was adopted by the Gordons of Esslemont. This discounts the Sobieski Stuarts claim to a 16th century origin for this sett.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Catherine Gordon於1472年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利時，她的父親Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotland42歲，母親Elizabeth Hay of Errol - Countess of Huntly31歲。她於1497年3月4日與Perkin Warbeck結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1537年10月在英國英格蘭波克夏費費爾德享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文聖 尼古拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: Gordon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Gordon in Berwickshire, named with Welsh gor ‘spacious’ + din ‘fort’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Gourdon in Saône-et-Loire, so called from the Gallo-Roman personal name Gordus + the locative suffix -o, -ōnis.
English (of Norman origin): alternatively, said to be a nickname from a diminutive of Old French gourd ‘heavy, dull, sluggish’ (compare 8 below).

variants.name: Gordin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Eyal, Moisey, Yakov, Zalman, Erez, Faina, Haya, Mendel.  Russian Leonid, Aleksandr, Boris, Feiga, Genady.
French: variant of   Gourdin  . This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Gordan
meanings: German: variant of Jordan . The surname Gordan is very rare in Germany.
Irish (Wexford and Sligo): adopted as an Anglicized form of Mag Mhuirneacháin ‘son of Muirneachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of muirneach ‘lovable’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Catherine Gordon was born in 1472, in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotland, was 42 and her mother, Elizabeth Hay of Errol - Countess of Huntly, was 31. She married Perkin Warbeck on 4 March 1497. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in October 1537, in Fyfield, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Saint Nicholas, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Catherine Gordon est née en 1472, à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotland, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Hay of Errol - Countess of Huntly, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Perkin Warbeck le 4 mars 1497. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en octobre 1537, à Fyfield, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint Nicholas, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Catherine Gordon 1472 in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotland 42 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Hay of Errol - Countess of Huntly 31. Sie hat am 4. März 1497 Perkin Warbeck geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb im Oktober 1537 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Fyfield, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Saint Nicholas, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Perkin Warbeck il 4 marzo 1497. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel ottobre 1537, nel Fyfield, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Saint Nicholas, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine Gordonが1472年にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーで生まれた時，父Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotlandは42歳，母Elizabeth Hay of Errol - Countess of Huntlyは31歳であった。1497年3月4日にPerkin Warbeckと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1537年10月にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアフイフィールドで65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンサイント ニチオラスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine Gordon(이)가 1472년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotland(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Hay of Errol - Countess of Huntly(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1497년 3월 4일 Perkin Warbeck(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1537년 10월 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 피필드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세인트 닉홀아스에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Perkin Warbeck em 4 de março de 1497. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Catherine Gordon родилась в 1472 г. в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotland было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hay of Errol - Countess of Huntly, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Perkin Warbeck 4 марта 1497 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла октябрь 1537 г. в местности фифиелд, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт ничолас, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

Murió en octubre de 1537, en Fyfield, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Saint Nicholas, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
